scripts.graphify: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; from graphify import detect, extract, build, cluster, analyze, report, export; detected = detect.detect(Path('.')); code_files = [Path(f) for f in detected['files']['code']]; result = extract.extract(code_files); G = build.build_from_json(result); communities = cluster.cluster(G); cohesion = cluster.score_all(G, communities); gods = analyze.god_nodes(G); surprises = analyze.surprising_connections(G, communities); labels = {cid: 'Community ' + str(cid) for cid in communities}; questions = analyze.suggest_questions(G, communities, labels); rep = report.generate(G, communities, cohesion, labels, gods, surprises, detected, {'input': result['input_tokens'], 'output': result['output_tokens']}, str(Path('.')), suggested_questions=questions); (Path('graphify-out') / 'GRAPH_REPORT.md').write_text(rep); export.to_json(G, communities, str(Path('graphify-out') / 'graph.json'))"
scripts.graphify:watch: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; from graphify.watch import watch; watch.watch(Path('.'))"
